prompt:
You are an Amazon SP-API listing specialist and an expert at writing search-engine-optimized (SEO) Amazon listings. For the product below, write an item_name of AT MOST 75 characters and a title_differentiation of AT MOST 125 characters. Always return both, each within its own limit. === PRODUCT CONTEXT === SKU: NPT-G11IFTHK-2PC-PZ Product Type: KNIFE Brand (from catalog): ASR Outdoor Existing Title: 11" Full Tang Hunting Knife with Guthook Heavy Duty Description: This Full Tang Hunting and Fishing Guthook Blade Knife will satisfy all of your in field needs. This knife is great for hunting and performing specialized tasks such as skinning, caping , and boning.

The 5.5" drop point blade is made of thick 1/4" 440 stainless steel and features a guthook for dressing game in the field. Full tang body the knife extends 11" featuring an ergonomic raised checkered grip for superior comfort and secure grip. Included with the knife is a heavy duty nylon sheath with protective insert.

Perfect Hunting Knife for All of Your Game Dressing Needs. Search Terms: Hunting Knives Hooked Knife Sheath Guthook Features: - Blade Material: Full Tang 1/4" 440 Stainless Steel - Style: Drop Point Guthook Hunting Knife - Secure Ergonomic Rubber Handle - Nylon Sheath w/ Belt Loop - Total Knife Length: 11" | Blade: 5.5" | Handle: 5" | Weight: 8.5oz === ITEM_NAME (title, <= 75 chars) === Write a concise, keyword-rich, SEO-optimized item_name — a shopper-facing title, not a part number. Derive these tokens, then assemble the title from them in order: ${brand} ${pack_size}-${pack_size_unit} ${size} ${color} ${name} - brand: use the catalog brand above. - pack_size + pack_size_unit: parse from the existing title (e.g. "4-pk", or a dimension like 13" -> pack_size "13", pack_size_unit "in"). Omit if absent. - size, color, name: parse from the existing title (name = what the product IS). Drop any token you cannot determine; never emit the SKU, MPN, or a part number. Lead with the brand; condense to AT MOST 75 characters. Amazon schema guidance: Provide a title for the item that may be customer facing === TITLE_DIFFERENTIATION (item highlight, 100–125 chars) === Write a compact, comma-separated list of the product's strongest, most search-relevant features/benefits — NOT a full sentence, NOT the brand, and NOT a repeat of the item_name (e.g. "Set of 6, Dishwasher Safe, 8oz, BPA-Free, Stackable"). Use the available space: aim for 100–125 characters, leading with the highest-value keywords. Never pad with filler or repeat a point. Capitalize the first letter of every word (e.g. "Natural Wood Grain", but keep acronyms like "US" fully uppercase). Do not use special characters — spell out "&" as "and" and "=" as "is" (e.g. "Yellow Is Real", "Works On US And International Currency"); only hyphen, double quote, and apostrophe are allowed. Amazon schema guidance: Provide product features or benefit driven phrases, not a full sentence. Information will appear only when the item name is under 75 characters. Do not repeat information already in the item name. === RETURN === Return ONLY a valid JSON object, no markdown fences, in this exact shape: {"item_name": "<= 75 char title", "tokens": {"brand": "", "pack_size": "", "pack_size_unit": "", "size": "", "color": "", "name": ""}, "title_differentiation": "<= 125 char benefit phrase"}

anthropic.item_name: ASR Outdoor 11" Full Tang Hunting Knife with Guthook
